name: Adam Langley
why_notable: One of the world's foremost TLS engineers. Co-designed Certificate Transparency alongside Ben Laurie. Primary author of BoringSSL — Google's OpenSSL fork used in Chrome and Android, which means his code handles TLS for billions of connections daily. Designed ChaCha20-Poly1305 and helped integrate it into TLS 1.3. His blog at imperialviolet.org is a primary source for understanding the internals of modern TLS.
